allow: Bash(grep -A10 "cluster-b-gateway" echo "" echo "Cluster-B Gateway IP:" kubectl --context kind-cluster-b get nodes -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.addresses[?\(@.type==""InternalIP""\)].address}' echo "" echo "Cluster-B Gateway Port:" kubectl --context kind-cluster-b get svc -n istio-system istio-ingressgateway -o jsonpath='{.spec.ports[?\(@.name==""http2""\)].nodePort}')
Bash(grep control-plane echo "" echo "ServiceEntry in Cluster-A:" kubectl --context kind-cluster-a get serviceentry -n nf-a-namespace)
